value.found_quote: [Playwright](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@playwright/mcp): Control and inspect a browser using Playwright.
value.rationale: The page lists Playwright only as a third-party MCP server (linked to npmjs.com/package/@playwright/mcp) that Codex can connect to, as an example of useful external MCP servers. It does not describe Playwright as an offering provided by OpenAI itself. Therefore the claim that OpenAI offers Playwright is not substantiated.
